name: Skillet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender.
2. Slice them into pieces about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Mash the potatoes lightly to break them up into several pieces.
4. Stir in the buttermilk and scallions, then season with salt and pepper.
5. Heat enough oil in a non-stick skillet to coat the bottom.
6. When the oil is hot enough, pour in the potato mixture and spread it evenly.
7. Reduce the heat to moderate and cook until the bottom of the pie is crisp and browned.
8. Slide the pie onto a plate and cut into wedges.
